items.title: SP-API Release Notes
items.excerpt: Selling Partner API new features, software updates, and changelog.
items.body: For releases prior to January 19, 2022, refer to Announcements in the Selling Partner API GitHub repo . May 27, 2026 API changes Listings Restrictions API v2021-08-01 Added the optional productType query parameter to the getListingsRestrictions operation. You can use this parameter along with a brand name to evaluate GTIN exemption restrictions for a specific product type. Notifications API v1 Added the filterExpression field to the createSubscription operation. You can use this field to filter events before notification delivery. Filters are applied to the notification payload using Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax. Added DeliveryTipChange as a supported order change type to the OrderChangeType notification schema. You can use this to track the status of a delivery tip for an order. Orders API v0 The following updates apply to veterinary products: Added the approvedAlternativeDetails field to the VerificationDetails object in the updateVerificationStatus operation. You can use this field to submit pre-approved alternative product attributes. Added the interimStatusDetail field to the VerificationDetails object in the updateVerificationStatus operation. You can use this field to provide granular progress updates while an order is pending verification to indicate that a veterinarian has been contacted. Added the ValidInterimStatusCodes field to the RegulatedOrderVerificationStatus object in the getOrderRegulatedInfo response. This field returns the list of supported interim status codes and customer-facing descriptions that you can use when you provide an interimStatusDetail . Orders API v2026-01-01 Added the breakdowns array to the getOrder and searchOrders operations. You can use this attribute to show an order's proceeds breakdown, including delivery tip...

items.title: A guide to targeting with Sponsored Products
items.excerpt: Discover tips to help you drive sales through targeting with Sponsored Products.
items.body: Guide A simple guide to effective targeting with Sponsored Products Tips to help you drive sales through targeting with Sponsored Products. Table of contents 1 . An introduction to Sponsored Products targeting What is targeting? 2 . Targeting options with Sponsored Products Automatic targeting Manual targeting Negative targeting Deciding which targeting strategy 3 . Automatic targeting with Sponsored Products Remember this When to choose automatic targeting Just getting started with Sponsored Products? Already have active manual campaigns? 4 . Manual targeting (keywords) with Sponsored Products More about match types Remember this Top tips Keyword types Do your research To note, for Kindle Direct Publishing (KDP) authors and book vendors Choose keyword targeting when: 5 . Manual targeting (product) with Sponsored Products Remember this Choose product targeting when: 6 . Negative targeting with Sponsored Products Consider adding the following as negative keywords Remember this 7 . Setting up strategic targeting for Sponsored Products campaigns How to be strategic Start by defining your business goals Next, choose your campaign strategy 6 tips to remember How campaign structure can impact advertising performance 8 . Sponsored Products targeting checklist An introduction to Sponsored Products targeting Strong targeting is crucial to build a solid foundation for your Sponsored Products campaigns, and can help to match shoppers intents to your products. What is targeting? Targeting is the way you define the context in which you want your ads to appear. That can be done in multiple ways. The most common is the use of keywords that match your ad with the shopping queries customers use when looking for something online. This guide will explore everything you need to know about...

items.title: Amazon PPC LIVE AMA with Kevin Sanderson
items.excerpt: Prime Day is coming. Is your PPC strategy ready? Because when Prime Day traffic shows up, weak campaigns get exposed fast. Join Kevin Sanderson LIVE this Tuesday at 12:00 PM ET for a Prime Day PPC AMA focused on helping Amazon sellers maximize visibility, improve conversions, and scale profitably during one of the biggest shopping events of the year. Bring your questions on: → Amazon PPC strategy and campaign optimi...
items.body: Prime Day is coming. Is your PPC strategy ready? Because when Prime Day traffic shows up, weak campaigns get exposed fast. Join Kevin Sanderson LIVE this Tuesday at 12:00 PM ET for a Prime Day PPC AMA focused on helping Amazon sellers maximize visibility, improve conversions, and scale profitably during one of the biggest shopping events of the year. Bring your questions on: → Amazon PPC strategy and campaign optimization → Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display ads → Bid optimization and budget management → Search term analysis and negative targeting → Improving CTR, conversion rate, and ROAS → Lowering ACOS and increasing ad efficiency → Prime Day campaign structure and scaling tactics Prime Day isn't the time to "set it and forget it." The sellers who win Prime Day are already optimizing their Amazon advertising strategy, refining campaign performance, and preparing for increased competition. Get your PPC questions answered before the biggest traffic spike of the summer. 📌 Need personalized help with your Amazon PPC strategy? Book a free strategy call → https://bit.ly/4byct9l

items.title: # 运营案例分析 # 女装老品两年多链接，今年4月广告ACOS从个位数飙到18%-24%，首页位暴涨后单量卡在40-50单，老链接该怎么救？
items.excerpt: 我的一个女装类老品有淡旺季，24年初新品期就开始爆单，25年两色齐码的时候，巅峰做到将近200单/日，且广告 ACOS 一直到今年3月份一直都是个位数，CPC 0.1。 但是从今年4月份开始，产品老广告（两组自动）开始跑飞了，Off Amazon 广告位曝光激增，一下子把我的 ACOS 跑飞了（后来通过 ERP 才发现）。当时没发现这个问题的时候，已经乱调广告预算和竞价了。 现在两个广告中： - 其中一组 ACOS 均值大概 18%左...

items.title: 各位大佬，以下是我新品的推广计划，各位佬帮我看看有哪些需要补充或者修改
items.excerpt: 我是一个新手，所以想最开始发货，在发货到到货期间，优化listing，做主图、高级A+，定价格，上架之后领取2个免费vine，可以的话再买几个vine，做几个直评，把评分提到4星以上，最好就是4.5，有评论之后，开广告。 至于价格，想法是先略高于同类竞品价格，然后vine回评论之后，就变回常规价格，从而出现下划线价格（历史最低价）标志，这个标志有利于给人们一种心理暗示，感觉占便宜的感觉，利于转化。目前价格暂时定为一开始15.99，常规...

items.title: 在ai热门的当下，如何去提高亚马逊工作的效率
items.excerpt: 作为不会代码的小麦，不会玩转cc，但好在有codex可以使用，目前已经合成了多个skill，但主要都是关于运营的，连接的端口有西柚api、sif mcp、sorftime mcp，但是额度一下子就用没了，目前已经不打算再去续额度，这个贴主要讲讲自己的使用情况，希望有大佬提供个方向 运营分为三个板块：链接自查，竞品跟踪，竞品拆解，这里重点想讲讲链接自查 链接自查其实是广告的调整，因为服务商给的额度太抠了，没办法剑走偏锋，目前我的数据来源...

items.title: 亚马逊图片别做得太正经：反差感，才是让用户停下来的钩子
items.excerpt: 我之前在这篇文章里面 没有差异化的主图，在搜索结果页里就像“裸奔”。 贴出了一个游戏椅的主图案例，不知道大家印象是否深刻。 因为最近看微博上一句话说：反差感就是性张力。 越是反差，越让人吃不准、搞不定，让人有探索欲。 好奇害死猫，慢慢就上钩了。 我一想，用游戏椅这个案例来解释，也是一样的道理。 按常规理解，游戏椅应该怎么拍？ 大多数人会想到：黑白电竞风、硬核线条、厚坐垫、腰靠、脚托、扶手、人体工学、久坐舒适。 这些当然都没错。 但那个...

items.title: # 运营案例分析 # 想问问大家都是怎么确定弃款的呢？我这款有7个五星好评、月盈利约24美元的睡裤，库存竟有74%超过90天，我该放弃它还是再备200单试试？
items.excerpt: 我是做北美站服装类目的，主要是做睡衣。 我在去年 9 月上架了一款睡裤，现在 listing 页面已经积累了 7 个 5 星好评。 过去 30 天的销售均价为 19.79 美元，日均销量为 1.7 件，盈利 2.55%（约 23.98 美元）。过去 30 天的销售广告总花费为 114.17 美元，广告订单占比为 54.55%。 1 月到美国仓库 245 件，卖到现在。 现有总库存 155 件，超过 90 天的库存有 116 件，也就是...

items.title: Stop Catching the Falling Knife on Amazon #amazonfba #ppctips #business
items.excerpt: Category demand can drop year over year while Amazon CPC rises, making category terms harder to win. Branded sales, declining revenue, external traffic, UGC content, influencer campaigns, and awareness can help create demand. Sellers can either pay more to capture shrinking demand or build new traffic before ad costs keep climbing. Stop bidding higher and hoping it works. Get a sharper Amazon growth plan before shri...
items.body: Category demand can drop year over year while Amazon CPC rises, making category terms harder to win. Branded sales, declining revenue, external traffic, UGC content, influencer campaigns, and awareness can help create demand. Sellers can either pay more to capture shrinking demand or build new traffic before ad costs keep climbing. Stop bidding higher and hoping it works. items.title: #750 - The Maldives Honeymoon Product Launch Strategy 2026
items.excerpt: Learn the latest updates on this proven Amazon launch strategy using keyword research, Rufus or Alexa for Shopping optimization, PPC, TikTok Shop traffic, and relevancy signals to rank faster.
items.body: Learn the latest updates on this proven Amazon launch strategy using keyword research, Rufus or Alexa for Shopping optimization, PPC, TikTok Shop traffic, and relevancy signals to rank faster. ► Watch The Podcasts On Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@Helium10SeriousSellersPodcast?sub_confirmation=1 ► Instagram: instagram.com/serioussellerspodcast ► Free Amazon Seller Chrome Extension: https://h10.me/extension ► Sign Up For Helium 10: https://h10.me/signup (Use SSP10 To Save 10% For Life) ► Learn How To Sell on Amazon: https://h10.me/ft Wait! Before you dive in… this is part 2 of a 2-part series, so don’t be that person who starts a movie halfway through and asks what’s going on. Go watch/listen to part 1 on the AM/PM Podcast first, where Bradley breaks down the AI and product research strategies that set up this Maldives Honeymoon launch strategy: https://h10.me/am526 In this special episode of the Serious Sellers Podcast, Bradley Sutton returns to the Maldives for episode 750 and breaks down his latest “Maldives Honeymoon” launch strategy. This time, he shares the exact tactics he recently tested to get new products to page one for multiple keywords in less than five days. From keyword research to listing optimization, this episode is packed with launch strategies for Amazon sellers who want to give their products the strongest possible start. Bradley explains why a successful launch begins before PPC campaigns ever go live. Sellers need to study competitor reviews, analyze TikTok Shop reviews, look at Rufus questions (Quick note: Rufus is now rebranded as Alexa for Shopping ) , and understand what kind of images are working in their niche. He also walks through several ways to build a stronger keyword list, including Cerebro, Brand Analytics, Search Query Performance...

items.title: #749 - From $100K To $7M On Amazon
items.excerpt: How did one Amazon brand go from overlooked to $7M? Discover the keyword, SEO, AI, and pricing strategies that helped unlock massive growth.
items.body: How did one Amazon brand go from overlooked to $7M? Discover the keyword, SEO, AI, and pricing strategies that helped unlock massive growth. 💰Get Helium 10 with a special discount to start or scale your e-commerce business here: https://h10.me/h10 ► Watch The Podcasts On Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@Helium10SeriousSellersPodcast?sub_confirmation=1 ► Instagram: instagram.com/serioussellerspodcast ► Free Amazon Seller Chrome Extension: https://h10.me/extension ► Sign Up For Helium 10: https://h10.me/signup (Use SSP10 To Save 10% For Life) ► Learn How To Sell on Amazon: https://h10.me/ft In this episode of the Serious Sellers Podcast, Bradley Sutton welcomes Andrew Bell to talk about the real Amazon operator experience behind his AI and listing optimization expertise. Andrew shares his journey from growing up in small-town Indiana and studying ancient Greek and preaching to eventually diving deep into business, SEO, Amazon strategy, and AI-powered workflows. Andrew breaks down how he helped Touch of Class, a niche home decor brand, grow from around $100,000 annually on Amazon to $7 million per year. He explains how he used Freedom Ticket, Helium 10 tools, keyword research, listing optimization, FBA, competitor tracking, and category-level keyword lists to turn thousands of niche products into a much stronger Amazon catalog. He also shares how the Amazon Brand Store became a major growth driver, with around $1 million in sales coming through store activity after treating it like an SEO page that could rank on Google. Bradley and Andrew also dive into the relationship between Amazon SEO, PPC, and Rufus, now Alexa for Shopping. Andrew explains why keywords still matter, but sellers also need to optimize for customer intent, use cases, benefits, pricing transparency, an...
